contract_claim: The README says the Docker image bundles toolchains for 'Python, JavaScript, and Java' debugging, but then says 'the image does not include a Ruby runtime'. The install-claude-mcp.sh shadow doc lists supported languages as 'Python (debugpy), JavaScript/TypeScript (Node 22+), Rust, Go (Delve), Java (JDK 11+), .NET/C# (netcoredbg), Mock' — notably listing JDK 11+ while the README's Requirements section says 'JDK 21+'. The shadow doc for the install script says 'Java (JDK 11+)' which contradicts the README's 'JDK 21+' requirement.
observed_behavior: Python (debugpy), JavaScript/TypeScript (Node 22+), Rust, Go (Delve), Java (JDK 11+), .NET/C# (netcoredbg), Mock.
